reviews.review_msg: Incredibly hard to understand and very unhelpful. Every one of her examples in class are nearly straight out of the textbook and her lessons are the same as the textbook just with less detail and way less clear language. Ontop of this she holds random pop quizez to ensure that you attend class and sit through her unless lectures. Not recommended.

Eldar was a great prof! Definitely would love to take another class with him. Doesn't use the textbook or even blackboard so you must go to class but then all the exams are based solely on his notes which is nice. Fast at emailing you back if you have any  questions and his lectures are interesting because he engages with the class a lot.
